mapper.sql: product_id, resource_id, title, category, condition_level, price, trade_location, description, image_file_ids, seller_user_id, product_status, on_shelf, stock_count, has_effective_order, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_info ( resource_id, title, category, condition_level, price, trade_location, description, image_file_ids, seller_user_id, product_status, on_shelf, stock_count, has_effective_order, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{resourceId}, #{title}, #{category}, #{conditionLevel}, #{price}, #{tradeLocation}, #{description}, #{imageFileIds}, #{sellerUserId}, #{productStatus}, #{onShelf}, #{stockCount}, #{hasEffectiveOrder}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM product_info WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE product_info SET on_shelf = 0, product_status = 'OFFLINE', update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND deleted = 0 AND on_shelf = 1 AND has_effective_order = 0 AND product_status = 'PUBLISHED'

UPDATE product_info SET has_effective_order = 1, product_status = 'LOCKED', update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND deleted = 0 AND on_shelf = 1 AND has_effective_order = 0 AND product_status = 'PUBLISHED'

UPDATE product_info SET has_effective_order = 0, product_status = 'PUBLISHED', update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND deleted = 0 AND has_effective_order = 1 AND product_status = 'LOCKED'
